physical_build: 15ft tall; heavy humanoid frame with four arms.
movement_language: Dismounts from an eight-legged mount to approach others.
stable_visual_summary: A towering 15ft Martian warrior characterized by olive-green skin, red eyes, and prominent tusks. The entity possesses a unique four-armed anatomy. In appearance, the leader is seen dismounting from an eight-legged creature to approach others unarmed, specifically carrying a metal armlet as a gesture of peace.
costume_signature: Unarmed, carrying a metal armlet as a peace offering.
personality: Capable of peaceful gestures (offering an armlet).
role: Leader of the Martian warrior race.
relationship_notes: Approaches others with a peace offering.
continuity_constraints: Must maintain 15ft height and four-arm anatomy.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific age or stage of life.
Detailed clothing/armor beyond the mention of an armlet.
